title: Make Real Money With AI
modules: Which AI Side Hustles Are Actually Viable
Freelancing With AI: What Clients Want
Build a Content Business Using AI
What to Charge and How to Price
Handling Legal and Ethical Gray Areas
Launch Your First AI Income Stream
synopsis: The AI side hustle space is full of hype — but buried in that hype are real opportunities that people your age are already monetizing. This course cuts through the noise and shows you which approaches actually generate income, and how to start one this week.
rationale: Young adults are actively seeking income beyond traditional employment, but lack structured guidance on distinguishing sustainable AI-assisted income streams from get-rich-quick traps.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can identify, launch, and price at least one viable AI-assisted income stream — whether freelance services, digital products, or content — with a clear plan for growing it.
